description_long: This is a high-end gaming laptop with a sleek, angular design and a prominent illuminated keyboard featuring red backlighting and highlighted WASD keys. The laptop has a large, high-resolution display with thin bezels, and the screen is open, displaying a vivid, futuristic wallpaper with a stylized eye logo. The chassis is predominantly matte black with subtle geometric accents and a visible logo on the back of the lid. The keyboard area includes additional illuminated touch controls and a secondary display above the keyboard, suggesting advanced functionality. The laptop appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and high-quality plastic, giving it a robust yet lightweight feel. The overall design is modern and aggressive, suitable for gaming or professional use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black gaming laptop with a red-backlit keyboard, illuminated controls, and a large, vivid display. The design is modern and angular, with a visible logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a vivid wallpaper, full keyboard with red backlighting, and illuminated touch controls above the keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and the illuminated keyboard and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a prominent logo and subtle geometric design, with no screen or keyboard visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen, illuminated keyboard, and the angular design of the chassis.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized eye logo is visible on the back of the lid, located in the upper right quadrant, with a sharp, angular design.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a vivid wallpaper with a stylized eye logo.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with red backlighting, highlighted WASD keys, a function row, and a numeric keypad. Additional illuminated touch controls and a secondary display are present above the keyboard.
